conversation.text: I want something for customer service.
Happy to help! To recommend the right solution, could you tell me a bit more about your team? For example, how many agents would be handling customer interactions?
We have about 10 people on our team.
Good to know — 10 agents is a great size for our plans. Do your customers mainly reach you by phone, or do you also handle other channels like chat, email, or messaging apps?
Mostly phone calls, but we also use WhatsApp with some customers.
That's helpful context — phone plus WhatsApp is a common combination we support well. What type of business are you in? That helps me recommend the right features.

Based on what you've shared — 10 agents, phone + WhatsApp — I'd recommend the Omnichannel Contact Centre (OCC) plan. It covers inbound/outbound calls with ACD routing, WhatsApp Business integration, and reporting. It's designed for teams of this size and scales well. Would you like to see a demo or get a pricing breakdown?
